data.title: Ex-Coinbase lawyer announces run for New York Attorney General, citing crypto policy
data.description:
Khurram Dara had been hinting for months that he might try to unseat state Attorney General Letitia James, claiming that she had engaged in “lawfare” against the crypto industry.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/lawyer-new-york-attorney-general-election-run?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_rnd%3Dwh51sk%26__%3D1763747147126%26_ts%3D1763747147126&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $84K as Fed’s Williams Re-Opens the Door to a December Rate Cut — Here Is Why It Matters
data.description:
"Bitcoin has made a notable recovery, rising above the $84,000 mark following comments from the Federal Reserve's Williams, who has hinted at the possibility of a rate cut in December. This development is significant for several reasons: it not only reflects investor optimism in the cryptocurrency market but also suggests a changing economic landscape that could impact monetary policy and, consequently, the value of digital assets."
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-rebounds-above-84k-as-feds-williams-re-opens-the-door-to-a-december-rate-cut-here-is-why-it-matters/

data.title: UK Operation to Hit Russian Sanctions Evasion Arrests 128, Seizes $32.6M in Crypto and Cash
data.description:
Operation Destabilise has established that one money laundering network operating in the UK was involved in buying a bank in Kyrgyzstan.
source: https://decrypt.co/349613/uk-operation-to-hit-russian-sanctions-evasion-arrests-128-seizes-32-6m-in-crypto-and-cash

data.title: Bitcoin Climbs Back Above $85,000 as Rate-Cut Expectations Surge
data.description:

source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-climbs-back-above-85000-as-rate-cut-expectations-surge/

data.title: Nakamoto feels pressure on its debt structured near Bitcoin’s all-time high
data.description:
Nakamoto Holdings felt pressure by the recent price drop for BTC. The company posted collateral to its structured $250M debt, and moved 367 BTC out of its treasury, explaining the coins were used for other investments.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nakamoto-feels-pressure-on-its-debt/

data.title: Coinbase to acquire Vector.fun, the Tensor-built Solana trading platform, to advance ‘everything exchange’ vision
data.description:
Vector’s tech will plug into Coinbase’s DEX integration, while Tensor Labs shifts its NFT marketplace and TNSR token to Tensor Foundation.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/379964/coinbase-vector-fun-tensor-solana-everything-exchange-vision?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation Roundup: Washington Tightens Its Grip on Digital Assets as Political and Legal Battles Intensify
data.description:
This week marked a turning point in U. S. crypto oversight, with lawmakers, regulators, and industry leaders all escalating their involvement in high-stakes debates over surveillance, illicit finance, developer liability, and the structure of the American digital-asset market.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-roundup-washington-tightens-its-grip-on-digital-assets-as-political-and-legal-battles-intensify/

data.title: Saylor Fires Back: “Strategy Is Not a Fund” as MSCI Review Threatens MSTR’s Future
data.description:
Michael Saylor has issued his strongest public rebuttal yet as pressure mounts over MSCI’s proposal that could strip Strategy (MSTR) of its place in some of the world’s most influential equity indices.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/saylor-fires-back-strategy-is-not-a-fund-as-msci-review-threatens-mstrs-future/

data.title:
INTEL: Michael Saylor’s Strategy holds roughly 650,000 $BTC at an average cost of ~$74,400. A drop below that level does not trigger forced liquidation.

Situations that could require BTC sales:
• Inability to refinance upcoming debt
• Equity market weakness limiting capital
